title: Leaf It To Me
description: Leaves blocks can now support blocks like torches, bells, and lanterns.
body:
## Overview

This is a simple mod that tweaks the LeavesBlock class to allow it to support any blocks on all sides. By default, this allows for placing blocks like torches, lanterns, bells, and cave vines on faces of leaf blocks that couldn't handle them before. This expands building options with no discernible negative consequences.

At least one more leaf-related QoL feature is planned. We'll see when it comes through!

## Config

None yet.

---

Feel free to direct any suggestions and bugs to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/leafittome/issues).
